name: Kris Lee
ai_summary: Kris Lee is a 19-year-old college student from Graniteville, SC seeking full-time work with a patient, calm approach to conflict resolution. He is passionate about helping children reach milestones and demonstrates strong consistency and humor in his caregiving style.

transcripts.q3:
Truly.
 My name is Christopher Lee. I'm 19 years old. I graduated from South Aiken, High School and I'm currently enrolled Denmark Technical College. I love kids, I'm very patient, very consistent.
 I'm a humorous person.
transcripts.q4: I stay in Graniteville South Carolina and I'm willing to travel within 30 minutes to an hour for my shift.
transcripts.q5: I am currently looking for a full-time shifts.
transcripts.q6: I will simply have a talk with both of the kids and hear them out and get an understanding of what happened in that situation but first I will calm them down and then I will get into the understanding of what happened in this situation.
transcripts.q7:
I would make a great up kid teacher.
 Because I am very patient.
 And my biggest thing is, I will, I love seeing kids accomplish their goals. And that's my whole thing of, helping them complete their Milestones day by day, and being patient with them, and just listening, and being an ear, and a shoulder for them to lean on.
